# Leonie Kaiser – KI & Digitalisierung
# https://leoniekaiser.com

## About
Leonie Kaiser is an AI & digitalization expert based in Lower Austria (Niederösterreich),
specializing in AI strategy, EU AI Act compliance, and process automation for small,
owner-led health and wellness practices (Wahlarzt/private-pay/self-pay) in the
DACH region (Austria, Germany, Switzerland).

## Services
- AI Potential Analysis (free 30-minute consultation)
- AI Strategy & Roadmap, tailored to small private practices
- Process automation (No-Code), tool-agnostic, chosen per use case
- EU AI Act & GDPR compliance consulting
- Implementation and team onboarding – no IT department required

## Expertise
- AI strategy for small, owner-led health and wellness practices
- EU AI Act compliance and ethical, human-centered AI deployment
- Process automation and No-Code implementation, integrated into existing tools
- 20+ years experience in global project management, marketing, and consulting
  (over a decade in regulated healthcare/pharma, several years in strategic
  business consulting, today AI and process consulting)
- Languages: German, English, Spanish

## Target audience
Small, owner-led private practices in prevention, therapy, and wellness –
currently physiotherapy/movement practices, longevity & medical wellness, and
nutrition counseling. Practices that rely (also) on private-pay clients, work
with sensitive health data, and have no in-house IT department.

## Geography
Lower Austria (Niederösterreich) based, serving the DACH region and remote
clients
